programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: In a episode parodying a typical 1940s murder mystery, Thomas features as a private eye who is investigating a case in San Francisco.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A teenager accidentally kills one of a mobster's henchmen during a robbery gone wrong and ends up being hired by a rival gangster.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint is suspected of committing a spate of jewel thefts from hotels on the French Riviera.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken has a spine-chilling confrontation with the supernatural when he is called in to guard expensive antique fittings in an eerie manor.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic 1970s police drama series. Regan and Carter investigate an art deal that is more than it seems, and ends up in a wasteground shootout.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Three Minutes to Fame or Shame: US robot combat series. Three minutes in the BattleBox separate eight bots from the Round of 16, but only four of them can emerge triumphant.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Thomas is attacked by an army of small-time crooks sent by a Mexican crime boss who is trying to prevent him testifying in a court case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A singer fears for her father when he is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Another adventure for freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. A girl who claims to be Hitler's daughter leads the Saint in a merry little jig involving neo-Nazis.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: A surprise party is planned for Ken, so Harry pretends that he is in need of a minder in order to get him out of the way for a while.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are called in when alarm bells start ringing all over their patch. Who is setting them off - and why.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. A local property developer offers to buy Arthur's lock-up and car lot, but Terry has his suspicions and turns to DS Jones for help.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series. Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz are excited by the prospect of a visit to a home in Iowa which is reportedly brimming with antique items.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jessee is left stranded and helpless by an avalanche. Meanwhile, Ray Veilleux faces Dalton with a premonition of death hanging over his head.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1990. Rocky Balboa adjusts to life after boxing but is then drawn back into it by an exciting new prospect.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1990. Rocky Balboa adjusts to life after boxing but is then drawn back into it by an exciting new prospect.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top flight of French football, including PSG v Lyon, Nantes v Brest, Monaco v Auxerre, Lille v Nice, Angers v Le Havre, Lorient v Marseille and Lens v Toulouse.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: US cooking competition. Tensions rise as the chefs face their most difficult challenge yet - communication - and cook one of the top five cuisines in America.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur attempts to do a deal with Tony Benson and his new nightclub, and Terry helps Dave by looking after the Winchester Club.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Thrilling spy drama. Weir receives a message from Valence that makes him question everything - and that includes his father.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Thomas is attacked by an army of small-time crooks sent by a Mexican crime boss who is trying to prevent him testifying in a court case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A singer fears for her father when he is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Another adventure for freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. A girl who claims to be Hitler's daughter leads the Saint in a merry little jig involving neo-Nazis.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: A surprise party is planned for Ken, so Harry pretends that he is in need of a minder in order to get him out of the way for a while.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are called in when alarm bells start ringing all over their patch. Who is setting them off - and why.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. It's all on the line for eight killer bots as the Round of 32 continues with spinners, lifters and flippers battling for survival.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is fired from a case and consoles himself by going on a lone mountain hike, but he ends up getting trapped under a WWII plane.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Sandown
programme.desc: Live coverage of racing from Sandown and Perth. The feature meeting of the day is at Sandown, with competitive National Hunt racing at Perth. Presented by Ed Chamberlin.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: A couple who have recently won the pools ask for Ken's help when they receive threatening letters - but Boon finds himself becoming emotionally involved with the lady.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank, where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy river to catch the Glyphis shark, a fish that is so elusive that it was only found in the 21st century.

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Nicki Shields presents highlights of the opening weekend of the 2026 British Touring Car Championship season from Donington Park.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly tackles the most dangerous haul of the season, trucking a multi-million dollar, 100-tonne load across the entire state of Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's chaos on the Dalton when a truck flips off the road and smashes into a tree. Elsewhere, Alex Debogorski faces tough questions from state police.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Wrestling documentary series. The Dynamite Kid earned worldwide fame with a riveting self-sacrificing style, but violent confrontations would destroy his legacy.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his right-hand man. A reformed gambler dies owing Arthur money, but a religious miracle seems to offer compensation.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a bachelor. Charlie uses his powers of persuasion to enable Jake to spend weekends at the beach house when he meets Judith's support group.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: US sitcom about a bachelor whose life is disrupted by his brother and young nephew. Charlie takes drastic measures after he is involved in a pregnancy scare.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Car Years
programme.desc: With the year 1966 selected, Vicki Butler-Henderson and Alex Riley get behind the wheel of two British sporters, but whose car is best? Only a panel of judges will decide..

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including highlights of Everton vs Watford, Leicester City vs Chelsea, and Grimsby Town vs Sheffield United.
